results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Stiefel-manifold LoRA optimization with retraction + vector transport IS the Stiefel rope-restore projection per-step mechanism in SLACK-TENSION-NULL.
EXACT TWIN — Stiefel-Bayes Adapter with Matrix Langevin prior + geodesic retraction covers Stiefel rope-restore projection paradigm.
Retraction-free + penalty-free Stiefel-LoRA algorithm covers the manifold landing problem that SLACK-TENSION-NULL's Stiefel rope-restore addresses.
PoLAR polar-decomposed orthogonal LoRA factor representation covers the orthogonal-structure-on-LoRA paradigm.
EXACT TWIN — OA-Adapter combines dynamic budget adaptation + orthogonal subspace learning, which IS the σ-tube-width adaptive null-space scheme.
EXACT TWIN — BiLoRA's 'almost-orthogonal parameter spaces' IS the relaxed-orthogonality σ-tube width concept; same functional effect.
CoSO continuous-subspace optimization across multiple subspaces IS the adaptive flexible subspace approach paralleling σ-tube width adjustment.
C-LoRA learnable routing + dynamic orthogonality covers the adaptive-orthogonality-constraint paradigm for CL.
